TAMAZIA · INSIGHTS · RESTAURANTS, BARS & F&B

Restaurants, Bars & F&B

Restaurants, fine dining, bars, hotels groups and dark kitchens.

Schema · ASA · Local Pack

In preparation

These slots are reserved with working titles. Each will be researched, drafted, and published over the coming weeks.

In preparation Google Maps · NAP

30,000 to 40,000 Citations: The Maps Architecture That Dominates a City

Citation-architecture math for restaurant-group local-pack dominance.

In preparation Schema.org Menu

Menu Schema Markup: The Rich-Result Opportunity Most Restaurants Ignore

Menu schema implementation that returns rich results in Google search.

In preparation Platform economics

Deliveroo and Uber Eats: Commission Structure vs Direct Ordering ROI

Substitute economics for direct ordering against delivery aggregators.

In preparation Schema · Booking

Reserve-a-Table Integrations: Google, OpenTable, SevenRooms

Restaurant reservation tech stack that converts both organic and brand search.

In preparation Brand authority

Michelin-Starred SEO: Authority Building Without Dilution

Top-tier restaurant SEO that preserves the prestige register.

In preparation Schema · Event

Event Calendar SEO: Private Hire and Function Booking Funnels

Private-hire revenue capture via event calendar structured data.

In preparation Schema.org Org

Dark Kitchens and Brand SEO: The Multi-Brand Indexing Problem

Cloud-kitchen brand differentiation in a single-address Google index.

In preparation GBP · Local SEO

Bar and Pub Local Pack: How to Win "Near Me" Without a Photographer

Local-pack ranking for hospitality without large photography budgets.

In preparation Directory citation

Food Directory Listings: 25+ Platforms Ranked by ROI

Cost-vs-impact ranking of UK / US / UAE food-directory platforms.

In preparation Google policy

Fine Dining Review Acquisition: Within Google's Policy, Outside of Fake Reviews

Compliant review-flow design for high-trust hospitality brands.
